name: Ruentex Materials Co.,Ltd.
summary: Ruentex Materials Co.,Ltd. produces and sells cement in Taiwan. It offers Portland blast furnace cement, Portland cement, and hearthstone powder. The company also provides mortar material, surface powder, adhesive material, caulk, non-shrinking mortar, mud, and elastic cement, as well as offshore grouting and home improvements. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
